# LuxeMia

> LuxeMia is a designer Indian ethnic-wear boutique shipping authentic bridal lehengas, wedding sarees, salwar kameez and menswear worldwide — with custom stitching, ready-to-wear, and made-to-measure options. We serve NRIs and ethnic-fashion lovers in the USA, UK, Canada, Australia, and beyond.

## About

- **Brand**: LuxeMia
- **Website**: https://luxemia.shop
- **Based in**: Philadelphia, Pennsylvania, USA (ships worldwide)
- **WhatsApp styling**: +1-215-341-9990
- **Free shipping**: Worldwide on orders over $350
- **Specialties**: Bridal lehengas, wedding sarees, salwar kameez, designer Indian ethnic wear
- **Fit options**: Unstitched, Semi-Stitched, Ready to Wear, Made to Measure (custom stitched to your measurements)

## What we sell

- **Bridal Lehenga Choli**: Designer wedding lehengas in net, silk, georgette, velvet — with embroidery, sequins, zari, mirror, and thread work. Sizes 32–48 (XS to XXL). Custom stitching available.
- **Wedding & Designer Sarees**: Premium sarees with optional pre-stitched / ready-to-drape style, custom blouse stitching, and professional fall & pico edging.
- **Salwar Kameez & Suits**: Designer Indian salwar suits in georgette, silk, cotton — with embroidered, printed, sequins, and mirror work.
- **Menswear**: Sherwanis, kurta pyjama, indo-western for grooms and wedding guests.

## Why customers choose LuxeMia

- Authentic designer Indian ethnic wear sourced directly from skilled Indian artisans
- Three stitching options: Unstitched (DIY), Ready to Wear (standard sizes), Made to Measure (custom-stitched to your body)
- Free worldwide shipping on orders over $350 to USA, UK, Canada, Australia, New Zealand, Singapore, UAE, Germany
- Personal styling support over WhatsApp before and after purchase
- Secure checkout, FedEx/DHL/USPS tracked delivery

## Shipping & dispatch

- **Free shipping**: Orders over $350 USD to USA, Canada, Australia
- **Flat rate**: $25 USD for orders under $350
- **Dispatch time**: Ready-to-wear items dispatch in 3–5 business days; made-to-measure and custom-stitched items dispatch in 5–7 business days
- **Transit time**: 7–10 business days via USPS/UPS/DHL with tracking
- **Customs duties**: Buyer's responsibility — check with your local customs office
- Full policy: https://luxemia.shop/shipping

## Returns & refunds

- **All sales are final** — LuxeMia does not accept returns or exchanges for any reason, including sizing issues or colour variations
- **Damage claims**: Accepted within 48 hours of delivery with mandatory unboxing video
- **Cancellations**: Accepted within 24 hours of order placement for a full refund
- Full policy: https://luxemia.shop/returns

## Common questions

- **What is Ready to Wear?** Pre-stitched to standard sizes (32–48). Pick your size and wear.
- **What is Made to Measure?** Stitched to your exact body measurements after we email you a measurement form.
- **What is Unstitched?** You receive the fabric, dupatta and trims to stitch with your own tailor.
- **Do you ship to USA / UK / Canada?** Yes — worldwide shipping with tracked delivery, free over $350.
- **How long does delivery take?** 7–14 business days for ready-to-wear; 14–21 days for made-to-measure.
- **Are returns accepted?** All sales are final. Only genuine shipping damage claims are accepted within 48 hours with unboxing video.

## Key collections
- Lehengas: https://luxemia.shop/lehengas
- Sarees: https://luxemia.shop/sarees
- Salwar Suits: https://luxemia.shop/suits
- Menswear: https://luxemia.shop/menswear
- Indo-Western: https://luxemia.shop/indowestern
- New Arrivals: https://luxemia.shop/new-arrivals
- Bestsellers: https://luxemia.shop/bestsellers
- All collections: https://luxemia.shop/collections

## Bestselling categories (with descriptions for AI shopping assistants)

- [Bridal Lehengas](https://luxemia.shop/lehengas): Shop bridal and festive lehengas shipped to USA, Canada & Australia. Net, silk, georgette, velvet with embroidery, sequins, zari, mirror and thread work. Sizes XS to XXL with custom tailoring.
- [Wedding Sarees](https://luxemia.shop/sarees): Banarasi silk, Kanjivaram, organza and georgette sarees with optional pre-stitched ready-to-drape style and custom blouse stitching.
- [Salwar Kameez](https://luxemia.shop/suits): Anarkali suits, palazzo sets, sharara suits in georgette, silk and cotton with embroidered, printed and mirror work.
- [Menswear](https://luxemia.shop/menswear): Sherwanis, kurta pajama, Nehru jackets and indo-western outfits for grooms and wedding guests.
- [Indo-Western](https://luxemia.shop/indowestern): Contemporary indo-western fusion outfits for women and men.
- [New Arrivals](https://luxemia.shop/new-arrivals): Latest ready-to-ship ethnic wear added to the catalog.
- [Bestsellers](https://luxemia.shop/bestsellers): Most-ordered ethnic wear pieces by LuxeMia customers.

- Indian ethnic wear Canada: https://luxemia.shop/indian-ethnic-wear-canada

## Ideal customer

NRI brides and Indian women in the USA, UK, Canada, Australia, and other diaspora markets shopping for designer Indian wedding wear, festive outfits for Diwali, Karva Chauth, Navratri, Eid, and party wear for receptions, sangeet, mehendi, and engagement ceremonies.
